zh.Brockhall, Preston, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Singleton於1360年出生在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓時，他的父親Thomas de Singleton21歲，母親Mrs Singleton19歲。他於1395年與Elizabeth Brockholes在英國藍卡爾布洛可爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1459年在英國藍卡爾布洛可爾斯享年99歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Singleton于1360年出生在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓时，他的父亲Thomas de Singleton21岁，母亲Mrs Singleton19岁。他于1395年与Elizabeth Brockholes在英国藍卡爾布洛可爾斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1459年在英国藍卡爾布洛可爾斯享年99岁。

nameMeanings.name: Singleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Singleton (Lancashire), probably from Old English scingol ‘shingle, wooden roof tile’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Bearers of this surname are said to be descended from Ughtred de Sinleton, holder of lands in Amounderness wapentake (Lancashire) c. 1160–90. This name was first recorded in Ireland in 1308 and firmly established in Louth and Monaghan during the 17th century.
habitational name from Singleton (Sussex), probably from Old English sængel, sengel ‘bundle, tuft’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Shingleton
meanings: English: late medieval variant of   Singleton  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Singleton was born in 1360, in Preston, Lancashire, England, his father, Thomas de Singleton, was 21 and his mother, Mrs Singleton, was 19. He married Elizabeth Brockholes in 1395, in Brockholes, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1459, in Brockholes, Lancashire, England, at the age of 99.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Singleton est né en 1360, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Singleton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mrs Singleton, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Brockholes en 1395, à Brockholes, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1459, à Brockholes, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 99 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Singleton 1360 in Preston, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Singleton 21 und seine Mutter Mrs Singleton 19. Er hat 1395 in Brockholes, Lancashire, England Elizabeth Brockholes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1459 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Brockholes, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Singleton è nato il nel 1360 nel Preston, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Singleton, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Singleton, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Brockholes nel 1395, nel Brockholes, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1459, nel Brockholes, Lancashire, England, all'età di 99 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Singletonが1360年にイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Singletonは21歳，母Mrs Singletonは19歳であった。1395年にイギリスランカシュアイアブロックhオレスでElizabeth Brockholesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1459年にイギリスランカシュアイアブロックhオレスで99歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Singleton(이)가 1360년 영국 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Singleton(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Singleton(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1395년 영국 랭카실르 브록홀스에서 Elizabeth Brockholes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1459년 영국 랭카실르 브록홀스에서 99세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Singleton nasceu em 1360, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Singleton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Singleton, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Brockholes em 1395, em Brockholes, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1459, em Brockholes, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 99 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Singleton родился в 1360 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Singleton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Singleton, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Brockholes в 1395 г. в местности броккхолесь, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1459 г. в местности броккхолесь, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 99 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Singleton nació en 1360, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Singleton, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mrs Singleton, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Brockholes en 1395, en Brockholes, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1459, en Brockholes, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 99 años.
